title: EU Releases Billions in Funds to Hungary Following Government Change
subtitle: New leadership in Budapest signals a shift in relations with Brussels as economic support is restored.

summary.en: The European Union has decided to release over €16 billion in funds to Hungary. These funds were previously frozen due to concerns under the former government of Viktor Orbán. New Prime Minister Péter Magyar has promised to carry out important reforms to meet EU standards. European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen praised the country for its recent progress. The money will support housing, transport, and local businesses in Hungary.
summary.zh: 歐盟決定撥付超過一百六十億歐元的資金給匈牙利。這些資金先前因奧班前政府時期的疑慮而遭到凍結。新任總理馬雅承諾將進行重要改革以符合歐盟標準。歐盟執委會主席馮德萊恩稱讚該國近期的進展。這筆資金將用於支持匈牙利的住宅、交通及在地企業。

paragraphs.en: The European Union has announced it will release more than €16 billion in funds to Hungary. This money had been blocked for several years during the time of former Prime Minister Viktor Orbán. The decision follows the recent election of a new leader, Péter Magyar, who won a landslide victory last month. This change in government has led to what European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen described as a "historic breakthrough" in relations between Brussels and Budapest.
paragraphs.zh: 歐盟宣布將撥付超過一百六十億歐元的資金給匈牙利。這筆款項在前任總理奧班（Viktor Orbán）執政期間遭凍結多年。此項決定是在上個月新領導人馬雅（Péter Magyar）以壓倒性優勢勝選後所做出的。歐盟執委會主席馮德萊恩（Ursula von der Leyen）形容，政府的更迭促成了布魯塞爾與布達佩斯之間關係的「歷史性突破」。

paragraphs.en: According to The Guardian, the European Commission believes that Hungary is now "turning the page." During a press conference in Brussels, von der Leyen noted that the new government has already made progress on long-overdue reforms. She told the new prime minister that the EU can feel a "strong wind of change" across the country. In response, Magyar stated that he agreed with the commission on all the necessary steps to receive the funding. He promised that his government would pass the laws required to fix past issues.
paragraphs.zh: 根據《衛報》報導，歐盟執委會認為匈牙利目前正「翻開新的一頁」。馮德萊恩在布魯塞爾的記者會上指出，新政府已在長期延宕的改革上取得進展。她向新任總理表示，歐盟能感受到該國正吹起「強勁的變革之風」。對此，馬雅表示他同意執委會提出的所有必要步驟，以獲取這筆資金。他承諾新政府將通過相關法律，以解決過去遺留的問題。

paragraphs.en: Deutsche Welle reports that the funding package is made up of several parts. This includes €10 billion from the EU’s recovery fund, €4.2 billion in cohesion funds—which are designed to help poorer member states improve their infrastructure—and an additional €2.2 billion that will be released as further reforms are finished. The money is intended to help rebuild the Hungarian economy, support public services, and assist small and medium-sized businesses. The new prime minister emphasized that this support is vital to jump-start the economy, which has seen very little growth over the last three years.
paragraphs.zh: 德國之聲報導指出，這筆資金方案由多個部分組成。其中包括來自歐盟復甦基金的一百億歐元、旨在協助較貧窮成員國改善基礎設施的四十二億歐元凝聚基金，以及隨著後續改革完成將再撥付的二十二億歐元。這筆資金旨在協助重建匈牙利經濟、支持公共服務，並協助中小型企業。新任總理強調，這項支持對於重振過去三年幾乎零成長的經濟至關重要。

paragraphs.en: However, not all the money is available immediately. Deutsche Welle noted that €2.2 billion of the total is tied to the restoration of academic freedom in Hungarian universities. Furthermore, another €500 million will remain held back until Hungary fully follows a recent ruling by the European Court of Justice regarding laws that discriminate against the LGBTQ community. The court recently ruled that a 2021 law, which was used to limit the rights of LGBTQ people, was unfair and against the rules of the European Union.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，並非所有資金都能立即動用。德國之聲指出，總額中的二十二億歐元與恢復匈牙利大學的學術自由掛鉤。此外，另有五億歐元將持續凍結，直到匈牙利完全遵守歐洲法院近期針對歧視性少數族群法律所做出的裁決。法院近期裁定，二零二一年一項用於限制少數族群權利的法律並不公平，且違反了歐盟規則。

paragraphs.en: These changes are already having an impact on daily life in Hungary. For example, Budapest police have officially approved the city's upcoming Pride parade for late June. Last year, the government under Orbán had tried to block the event, using legislation that claimed to protect children. While the new government has not yet officially removed the laws that banned such events, organizers of the Pride parade said they feel confident the event will go ahead. Police stated that during their meetings with the organizers, no reasons were found to stop the march.
paragraphs.zh: 這些改變已對匈牙利的日常生活產生影響。例如，布達佩斯警方已正式批准該市將於六月下旬舉行的同志遊行。去年，奧班領導的政府曾以保護兒童為由，試圖阻撓該活動。雖然新政府尚未正式廢除禁止此類活動的法律，但遊行主辦單位表示，他們有信心活動將能順利進行。警方表示，在與主辦單位會面後，並未發現任何理由可以阻止遊行。

paragraphs.en: Economically, the situation in Hungary remains challenging. Deutsche Welle reports that the country has a large budget deficit, which is the difference between how much money the government spends and how much it collects in taxes. This deficit could reach 6.2% of the country's total economic output this year. Additionally, interest rates remain high at 6.25%. Despite these problems, the national currency, the forint, has started to improve in value since the election of Péter Magyar, partly because investors expect the new EU funding to help the economy recover.
paragraphs.zh: 在經濟方面，匈牙利的處境依然嚴峻。德國之聲報導稱，該國面臨龐大的預算赤字，即政府支出與稅收之間的差額。今年赤字可能達到該國國內生產毛額的百分之六點二。此外，利率仍維持在百分之六點二五的高點。儘管存在這些問題，匈牙利貨幣福林在馬雅當選後已開始升值，部分原因是投資人預期新的歐盟資金將有助於經濟復甦。

paragraphs.en: Looking ahead, the relationship between Hungary and the EU appears to be entering a new phase. Under the previous administration, Brussels and Budapest frequently argued over domestic policies and foreign policy issues, such as how to respond to the war in Ukraine. By promising to follow EU rules and improve human rights, the new government hopes to secure its place as a cooperative member of the bloc. As Magyar told reporters, the goal is to bring this money home to rebuild the country and strengthen the competitiveness of Hungarian companies. Whether these reforms will be enough to satisfy all EU requirements remains to be seen, but the release of these funds marks a major step forward for the new administration.
paragraphs.zh: 展望未來，匈牙利與歐盟的關係似乎正進入新階段。在前任政府執政期間，布魯塞爾與布達佩斯經常在國內政策及外交議題上發生爭執，例如如何應對烏克蘭戰爭。透過承諾遵守歐盟規則並改善人權，新政府希望確保其作為歐盟合作成員國的地位。正如馬雅告訴記者的，目標是將這筆資金帶回國內以重建國家，並增強匈牙利企業的競爭力。這些改革是否足以滿足歐盟的所有要求仍有待觀察，但這筆資金的釋出標誌著新政府向前邁出了重要的一步。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To start a new, more positive chapter in a situation after a difficult period.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 翻開新的一頁；展開新局面。
keyTerms.noteZh: 字面上是翻書，這裡比喻結束過去的衝突，開始新的階段。文中：According to The Guardian, the European Commission believes that Hungary is now "turning the page."

keyTerms.definitionEn: To make something start or develop more quickly.
keyTerms.noteZh: 原指用外接電源啟動沒電的汽車，這裡比喻刺激經濟成長。文中：The new prime minister emphasized that this support is vital to jump-start the economy, which has seen very little growth over the last three years.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To keep something from being released or given.
keyTerms.noteZh: 這裡指資金被暫時扣住，不予發放。文中：Furthermore, another €500 million will remain held back until Hungary fully follows a recent ruling by the European Court of Justice regarding laws that discriminate against the LGBTQ community.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To happen or take place as planned.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「前進」，這裡指活動如期舉辦。文中：While the new government has not yet officially removed the laws that banned such events, organizers of the Pride parade said they feel confident the event will go ahead.

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: EU to release €16bn to Hungary previously frozen under Orbán

sources.name: Deutsche Welle (DW) Top
sources.title: EU unblocks €16 billion in Hungary assistance as Magyar promises reforms

quiz.question: Which of the following describes the specific conditions under which the entire €16 billion funding package will be released to Hungary?

options.A: The full amount is available immediately as long as the new government promises to follow EU rules.
options.B: The total amount is split into parts, with some funds dependent on academic freedom and LGBTQ rights compliance.
options.C: The funds are released only after the European Court of Justice confirms the budget deficit has dropped below 6.2%.
options.D: The money is provided in one lump sum to help the government pay off its high-interest debts.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第四段，總金額並非一次性發放，其中 22 億歐元與恢復學術自由有關，另有 5 億歐元則取決於匈牙利是否遵守歐洲法院關於 LGBTQ 權益的裁決。選項 A 錯誤，因為文章明確指出並非所有資金皆可立即取得；選項 C 錯誤，因為文章雖提到赤字問題，但並未將其列為資金發放的條件；選項 D 錯誤，因為資金的主要目的是用於經濟重建與公共服務，而非直接償還債務。

quiz.question: Based on the article, what can be inferred about the change in the political climate in Hungary regarding public events?

options.A: The new government has officially repealed all laws that were used to restrict public gatherings.
options.B: The police are now ignoring all previous legislation to allow for more freedom of expression.
options.C: The administration's shift in attitude has created an environment where organizers feel safer, even without formal legislative changes.
options.D: The Pride parade organizers are now working directly with the European Commission to ensure their safety.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。第五段提到，儘管新政府尚未正式廢除限制性法律，但 Pride 遊行主辦方已感到信心，且警方在與主辦方會面後並未找到阻止遊行的理由。這暗示了政府態度的轉變（即不再像前任政府那樣積極阻撓）已對社會氛圍產生影響。選項 A 錯誤，文章明確說尚未正式移除法律；選項 B 錯誤，警方並非無視法律，而是基於新情勢進行評估；選項 D 錯誤，文章並未提到主辦方與歐盟委員會直接合作。

quiz.question: In the second paragraph, what does the phrase 'turning the page' most likely mean in the context of Hungary's relationship with the EU?

options.A: Starting a new chapter or beginning a different approach after a period of conflict.
options.B: Deleting all records of past disagreements between Budapest and Brussels.
options.C: Physically reading through the legal documents required for the funding.
options.D: Changing the official language of the government to improve communication.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。片語 'turning the page' 在此處為隱喻用法，意指結束過去一段充滿爭議與衝突的時期，開始採取新的合作態度或方向。選項 B 錯誤，這並非指刪除紀錄；選項 C 錯誤，這不是字面上的閱讀動作；選項 D 錯誤，文章完全未提及語言變更。此用法在政治語境中常見，表示關係的轉折與改善。

quiz.question: What is the primary focus of this article?

options.A: The technical details of how the European Union manages its budget and cohesion funds.
options.B: The personal political career and election campaign of the new Prime Minister, Péter Magyar.
options.C: The economic challenges and high interest rates currently facing the Hungarian forint.
options.D: The shift in EU-Hungary relations following a change in government and the subsequent release of frozen funds.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。本文開頭即點出歐盟解凍匈牙利資金，隨後解釋這是因為匈牙利政權輪替，並探討了這對雙邊關係、改革進程及經濟帶來的影響。選項 A 錯誤，技術細節僅是背景；選項 B 錯誤，總理僅是推動變革的關鍵人物，文章焦點在於政策與關係；選項 C 錯誤，經濟挑戰僅是文章提到的其中一個側面，而非全文核心。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
